title: Tender Herbal British Chicken Trifle
description: A light and flavorful British dish featuring chicken, herbs, and a touch of red chilli flakes, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and red chilli flakes.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 10 minutes.
In a large donabe, arrange a layer of cauliflower florets.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place it on top of the cauliflower.
Sprinkle chopped parsley and thyme over the chicken.
Cover the donabe with a lid and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Let the trifle rest for a few minutes before serving.
